description: Indo-Iranian Border Marker - informative for populations of the Northwest Subcontinent and Eastern Plateau.
South Asian Specific Marker - informative for distinguishing Indo-European speaking populations of the subcontinent.
Dravidian Ancestry Marker - highly diagnostic for Southern Indian and Sri Lankan populations.
SLC24A5 variant - highly informative for West Eurasian and South Asian populations.
Ancestral South Indian (ASI) Marker - diagnostic for the indigenous populations of the Indian subcontinent.
SLC24A5 variant - associated with lighter skin pigmentation, prevalent in South Asian populations.
South Asian Ancestry Marker - informative for populations from the Indian subcontinent.
South Asian Ancestry Marker - informative for Indo-Aryan and Dravidian populations.
Punjabi Ancestry Marker - informative for Northern Indo-Aryan populations.
SAS/MENA Tie-Breaker - Highly specific to the Indian subcontinent, prevents misclassification as Iranian/Middle Eastern.
SAS/EAS Tie-Breaker - Differentiates populations south of the Himalayas from East/Southeast Asian groups.
SAS/EUR Tie-Breaker - Diagnostic for Ancestral South Indian (ASI) components, effectively absent in Europe.
SAS/EAS Tie-Breaker - Anchors Indo-Aryan genetics, strongly separating the subcontinent from East Asia.
SAS/MENA Tie-Breaker - Diagnostic for deeper South Asian (AASI) lineages.
Ancestral South Indian (ASI) Marker - highly diagnostic for the indigenous Neolithic populations of the South subcontinent.
Ancestral North Indian (ANI) Marker - informative for the West Eurasian related expansion into the Northern subcontinent.
West Eurasian-South Asian Cline Marker - helps distinguish the level of Western Eurasian admixture in the subcontinent.
Austroasiatic/Munda Indian Marker - diagnostic for the early Austroasiatic speaking populations of Central and Eastern India.
Western Indian Informative Marker - highly prevalent in Indo-Aryan speaking populations of Western India.
South Asian-Caspian Cline Marker - indicative of West Eurasian admixture in North India.
Dravidian Genomic Marker - characteristic of the Southern Indian subcontinent.
Ancestry Informative Marker for South Asian populations.
